# Handoff — ASAP Incoherence Explorer (regenerated by /leave, 2026-07-19 session 2)

## State
- **App LIVE**: https://hoomham.github.io/asap-incoherence/ — CI green, deployed = HEAD (b951dd0).
- Repos: root `HoomHam/asap-incoherence` (public, Pages CI), workspace
  `HoomHam/asap-incoherence-workspace` (private). Both clean + pushed.
- Session 2 made all animations physical:
  - Rep/readout duration scales with `at` (6 s at v3 default, clamp 1–20 s).
  - Polyhedron sequence animation replays ACTUAL k(t) samples — the old stylized
    "morph" was removed after F17 (kasap rep rotations compose in place; rotating
    the original basis per rep is wrong from rep 2 on).
  - Camera starts zoomed, pulls back with running-max radius, rests at default.
  - "draw readout" buttons on 3D curves AND Projections: all selected ilvs grow
    sample-by-sample center→kmax (shared makeReadoutAnim factory in main.ts;
    axes pinned during draw).

## Key facts (details in workspace/canon/facts.md)
- F17 NEW: kasap rep rotations COMPOSE (in-place rotarb) — visualize via real
  k(t) replay only, never per-rep rotation of the original basis.
- F12 gridding σ=2/W=4/Beatty matches finufft 4e-4 · F14 golden = measured traj,
  app ω = 2π·k·FOV/ms · F15 n valid 0.5–1.5, n≳3 @ v3 timing NaN (guarded) ·
  F16 any even PSF N 16–128.

## Next steps (in likely order)
1. Hooman drives the science: rotation-angle slider sweep (~6.5-ilv sub-period,
   F3), n-sweep vs incoherence (n=0.8 → coh 2.01 vs 1.50 @ n=2).
2. Animation polish if asked: speed control, longer trails, rep-pause marker.
3. Perf if it annoys: full-set PSF ~12 s WASM (no threads on Pages — COOP/COEP).

## Open questions
- None blocking. GitHub Pages caches index.html ~10 min — hard-refresh after deploys.
